task_description: Implement a prototype test level demonstrating 5 world physics systems: Snow (snowGrid accumulation with white overlay), Footprints (snowDepth zeroed on player path, gradual refill), Wind (drives rain/snow direction), Blood (splatter system with per-tile state grid), and Torch Light (LightingFilter + LightSource integration). State grids live in :core with unit tests; shader filters and the demo scene live in :game with screenshot harness captures for CI verification.

verification.summary: All 3 module compile checks pass. 26+ unit tests in :core for weather grids pass. Screenshot harness renders all 5 physics_*.png files (79KB-383KB). All 20 total screenshots render successfully.
